objective: Assess the reconcile_harness refactor plan (single harness writer + strip direction + 20-pair transition-matrix test) for feasibility, AC coverage, and host-content safety.
key_changes: Verified all assumed APIs exist: Mode derives Copy/PartialEq/Eq; GroveConfig::load/save, active_mode, ModeChoice, ExploreConfig::load/config_path are pub and reachable from the CLI crate.
Confirmed current cli/src/init.rs matches the plan's analysis (write_harness, write_steering_md, write_mcp_json_with, sentinel constants, per-mode content builders).
Confirmed harness table is mode-exact and encodes the bug-2 fix (AC#3): leaving McpLlm strips AGENTS.md block and reverts .mcp.json args to [serve].
Confirmed integration test init_provisions_and_wires_harness_per_target is non-breaking under the new config.json write; implementer must preserve .mcp.json-before-CLAUDE.md report order.
Advisory: AC#5 active_mode-consistency + T07 fixture reuse deferred to a single-pass round-trip test rather than the 20-pair loop — recommend widening or documenting.
Advisory: strip_steering_block must also remove the \n\n separator write_steering_md inserts, so repeated A->B->A cycles don't accrete blank lines (matrix is single-hop).
Advisory: ensure single trailing newline at EOF after stripping (AC#7); block-only case correctly empties (not deletes) the file.
Advisory: unused old_mode param is mandated by AC#1 and is fine on a private fn (no clippy warning).
